prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **Garrett GTX5533R** turbocharger system (twin-turbo) for the **6.75L V8 (L410TT)** engine, paired with a **MagnaFlow 304 stainless steel 3.5-inch cat-back exhaust** featuring quad 4.5-inch polished tips and a **Milltek Sport downpipe** with 200-cell catalytic converters for optimized backpressure and Euro 6 compliance

Installation of a **Motec M150 ECU** with a **Bentley Mulsanne Speed-specific calibration** (developed by **Dyno Dynamics UK**), including **port-injected methanol-water (AEM 30-3300) for knock suppression** and a **custom intercooler upgrade (PWR Australia) with 40% larger core volume** to handle sustained boost levels of 1.2 bar (17.4 psi)

Replacement of the factory **ZF 8HP90 transmission** with a **Porsche PDK 9-speed (9A1) conversion kit (by **GTSport**)**, including a **South Bend twin-disc clutch (SD-SB6-2400-TI)** and a **Quaife ATB differential** for improved torque split and launch control optimization
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Mulsanne Speed-specific) with **carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser**, paired with **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 22-inch forged wheels** in a **matte black finish with polished lip (9.5J front, 11J rear)** and **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (285/35 R22 front, 325/30 R22 rear)**

Custom **Brabus Shadow Line** exterior package, including **painted brake calipers (Brembo GT 6-piston front, 4-piston rear) in Bentley Racing Green**, **debadged grille with laser-etched Bentley logo**, and **carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals (Osram LEDriving SL 1)**

Interior overhaul with **Recaro Pole Position CS seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery)**, **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede grip)**, and **Alcantara headliner with Bentley embroidery**, paired with a **Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Series audio system (18-speaker, 2200W) and a **custom roll cage (by **Sparco**) painted in Bentley Beluga Black**
